chunks.content:
# Third-party notices

This project uses `@nirholas/pump-sdk`, distributed under the MIT License, for the optional off-chain `...pump` vanity mint generator and as a reference for Solana instruction-builder patterns.

It also depends on the Anchor framework, Solana web3/SPL libraries, Jupiter Swap API, Raydium SDK, wallet-adapter, Next.js, React, and Metaplex Token Metadata. Review each dependency's license and current terms before distribution or production deployment.

FROM node:22-slim AS build
WORKDIR /app
RUN corepack enable
COPY . .
RUN pnpm install --frozen-lockfile=false && pnpm --filter @core-launchpad/web build
CMD ["pnpm", "--filter", "@core-launchpad/web", "start"]
